# thoth_effective_policy_bundles (Data Source)

Reads effective active policy bundles for one agent scope.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thoth_effective_policy_bundles" "coding_agent" {
  agent_id    = "coding-agent"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Optional

- `agent_id` (String) Optional agent identity filter.
- `framework` (String) Optional framework filter (OPA or CEDAR).

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Effective bundle rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total effective bundles returned.
